message:
fix(conformance): fix base fixture API signatures for configuration, ui_component, and multi shapes

- Fix registerFlag to use (name, spec) two-arg API
- Fix registerShortcut to use (key, spec) two-arg API with handler
- Fix registerMessageRenderer to use (customType, renderer) two-arg API
- Add 3 integration tests for configuration, ui_component, multi shapes
- Expand batch summary test to cover all 8 extension shapes
- All 66 integration + 39 unit tests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
